buttons.outline: border-2 border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground text-foreground

inputs.default: rounded-full border-border bg-background px-6 py-3 text-base shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.default: rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

landing_page.hero: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center min-h-[80vh] bg-white relative overflow-hidden
landing_page.hero_input_group: flex w-full max-w-xl items-center space-x-2 bg-white p-2 rounded-full border shadow-lg ring-offset-2 focus-within:ring-2 ring-primary/20

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r bg-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-30
dashboard.header: sticky top-0 z-20 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b

illustrations.hero_bg: Use subtle geometric patterns (SVG) or soft gradients. Avoid heavy photos.
illustrations.features: Use Lucide icons with colored backgrounds (p-3 rounded-xl bg-orange-100 text-orange-600)

implementation_instructions.step_1_setup: Install 'Manrope' font. Update tailwind.config.js (or index.css theme) with new color palette and radius.
implementation_instructions.step_2_components: Customize shadcn components (Button, Input, Card) to match 'pill' and 'clean' aesthetic. Remove default 'ring' styles if too aggressive, replace with subtle border colors.
implementation_instructions.step_3_pages: Redesign Landing Page first. Focus on the 'Hero Input' component - it is the core of the app. Make it big and prominent.
implementation_instructions.step_4_dashboard: Apply the new card style to dashboard widgets. Ensure white background for cards on a subtle gray page background (#F8FAFC).
implementation_instructions.step_5_details: Add green checkmarks (Lucide 'Check' icon) to feature lists. Add 'pill' badges for tool categories.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts
Sonner component are located in '/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
